title: Cauthon Homes
description: A basic yet powerful homes plugin
body:
## CauthonHomes
Cauthon Homes is a simple yet useful plugin thats used to:

1. Set Homes
2. Teleport to your Homes
3. Delete your Homes

Commands:
1. /sethome [name]: Sets home with name. If you dont provide a name it will be named "Default"
2. /home [name]: Teleports you to your home with delay settable in the config file. Cancels if player moves 1 block, gets hit or leaves the server. If you dont provide name it will teleport you to "Default" home.
3. /deletehome [name]: removes name home.

There is a configurable home limit in config.yml.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
